LoginIntroDescription: Sign in to discover nearby shops on the map, place orders, or open your own digital storefront.
AboutIntro1: GPS Shops is a global, location-aware marketplace that connects people with the shops, services, and experiences around them — wherever they are in the world.
AboutIntro2: We combine the power of local discovery with the convenience of online shopping, helping businesses create beautiful digital storefronts that customers can find instantly through map-based search and global discovery.
OurMissionP1: We believe local commerce should feel as effortless as scrolling a feed.
OurMissionP2: From a single market stall to a growing retail chain, every business deserves the ability to be discovered, browsed, and supported online without needing expensive websites, complex systems, or large marketing budgets.
DiscoverNearbyShopsDesc: Use the interactive map to explore shops, services, and local businesses near your current location.
BrowseAndOrderDesc: View menus, products, and services, build your basket, and place orders quickly from your phone.
OpenYourOwnShopDesc: Create and manage your own digital storefront with a powerful mobile-first dashboard designed for speed and simplicity.
GoGlobalDesc: Upgrade to Pro Mode to unlock Global Shop visibility, custom GPS location settings, reduced adverts, and premium features.
MultiLanguageThemeDesc: Use the platform in your preferred language and theme for a fully personalised experience.
WhyGPSShopsP1: Because the future of shopping is not just online.
WhyGPSShopsP2: It is local, global, mobile, and immediate.
FounderVisionP1: GPS Shops began as an idea to bridge the gap between physical shops and the digital world.
FounderVisionP2: Long before modern AI tools and rapid app builders, the vision was simple:
FounderVisionP3: Make it possible for any business, anywhere, to create a digital shop that customers could discover instantly through location and mobile technology.
FounderVisionP4: This original founder video shares the early concept behind what is now GPS Shops.
FounderVisionP5: While the platform has evolved significantly since then, the mission remains the same:
WatchOriginalConceptVideo: Watch the original concept video below.
GetInTouchP1: Questions, feedback, partnerships, or want to list your shop?
